name: aet-eaw-edit
displayName: Alamo Engine Tools - Empire at War Edit
description: Editor intelligence for Star Wars: Empire at War and Forces of Corruption mod development - XML completions, diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, rename, and Lua support.

commands.title: EaWEdit: Initialise Localisation Project from Baseline

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled.markdownDescription: Enables the Empire at War specific LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.executable.markdownDescription:
Path to `PG.StarWarsGame.LSP.Server.exe`. Download the server archive from the [releases page](https://github.com/AlamoEngine-Tools/pg-starwarsgame-lsp/releases), extract it, and point this setting at the `.exe`.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true` and `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.enabled#` is `false`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.locale.markdownDescription:
Language locale used for hover text and diagnostics.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type.markdownDescription:
Where to load the EaW baseline index from. Use `http` to download automatically; `local` to point at a file; `none` to disable baseline loading.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.localPa.markdownDescription:
Path to a local baseline `.aet` file.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type#` is `local`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.url.markdownDescription:
Custom HTTP URL for the baseline `.aet` file. Leave empty to use the default source.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.source.baseline.type#` is `http`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source.markdownDescription:
Where to load the EaW XML schema from. Use `http` to fetch from GitHub (default); use `local` to point at a local copy.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.url.markdownDescription:
Custom HTTP URL for the EaW XML schema index. Leave empty to use the default GitHub source.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source#` is `http`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.localPath.markdownDescription:
Path to the local EaW XML schema directory (`schema/eaw/`).

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.schema.source#` is `local`.

aet-eaw-edit.localisation.editorEnabled.markdownDescription:
Enables the built-in localisation editor.

The editor panel also requires `#aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.localisation#` to be enabled.

aet-eaw-edit.localisation.format.markdownDescription: Default format offered when initialising a new localisation project. Only used when the `.pgproj` does not already declare a `localisation` node - an existing project's own declared format always wins.
markdownEnumDescriptions:
The game's proprietary *.DAT format.

*Not recommended if the project is being worked on by multiple people.*
A comma-separated file per language. Recommended.
An XML file used by the [Empire at War Text Editor](https://www.nexusmods.com/starwarsempireatwar/mods/1859)

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.executable.markdownDescription:
The path to the [ModVerify](https://github.com/AlamoEngine-Tools/ModVerify/releases) executable.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.baseGameDirectory.markdownDescription: The path to the base game **Star Wars: Empire at War**'s install directory. If not provided, the extension will try to find a valid install but exit if none can be found.

aet-eaw-edit.modVerify.expansionDirector.markdownDescription: The path to the expansion pack **Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption**'s install directory. If not provided, the extension will try to find a valid install but exit if none can be found.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.enabled.markdownDescription:
Start the LSP server from source using `dotnet run --project` instead of a pre-built executable. Requires `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.projectPath#` to be set.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode.projectPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `PG.StarWarsGame.LSP.Server.csproj` file used when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.devMode#` is enabled.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.debug.traceServer.markdownDescription:
LSP wire-protocol trace level. Set to `messages` or `verbose` to log traffic in the output panel for debugging.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.lsp.debug.waitForDebugger.markdownDescription:
Pass `--wait-for-debugger` to the LSP server process on startup, causing it to pause until a .NET debugger attaches.

Only applies when `#aet-eaw-edit.lsp.enabled#` is set to `true`.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.completion.markdownDescription:
Enables code completion in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.hover.markdownDescription:
Enables hover tooltips in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.diagnostics.markdownDescription:
Enables diagnostics (error and warning squiggles) in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.goToDefinition.markdownDescription:
Enables go-to-definition in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.findReferences.markdownDescription:
Enables find-all-references in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.rename.markdownDescription:
Enables symbol rename in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.codeLens.markdownDescription:
Enables code lenses (reference counts, variant links) in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.inlayHints.markdownDescription:
Enables inlay hints in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.codeActions.markdownDescription:
Enables code actions (quick fixes) in EaW XML files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.linkedEditing.markdownDescription:
Enables linked editing of matching XML tag pairs: renaming an opening tag renames its closing tag simultaneously.

Requires VS Code's `#editor.linkedEditing#` setting to be enabled to take effect.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.xml.autoCloseTag.markdownDescription:
Automatically inserts the matching closing tag when you type the `>` that ends an XML opening tag.

Requires VS Code's `#editor.formatOnType#` setting to be enabled to take effect.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.completion.markdownDescription:
Enables code completion in Lua script files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.hover.markdownDescription:
Enables hover tooltips in Lua script files.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.diagnostics.markdownDescription:
Enables diagnostics (error and warning squiggles) in Lua script files.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.goToDefinition.markdownDescription:
Enables go-to-definition in Lua script files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.rename.markdownDescription:
Enables symbol rename in Lua script files. Also required for global rename of XML objects that are referenced from Lua scripts.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.codeLens.markdownDescription:
Enables code lenses in Lua script files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.inlayHints.markdownDescription:
Enables inlay hints in Lua script files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.lua.codeActions.markdownDescription:
Enables code actions (quick fixes) in Lua script files.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.story.discovery.markdownDescription:
Enables campaign story-chain discovery: plot manifests and story thread files are typed and validated (story event/reward parameters, chain errors like missing plot files).

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.story.graphDiagnos.markdownDescription:
Enables campaign story-graph diagnostics on story thread files: dangling or cyclic prerequisites, duplicate and ambiguous event names, unreachable events, suspended plots nothing activates, event tag order, and over-long flag names.

Builds on `#aet-eaw-edit.features.story.discovery#` - without discovery, story files are not typed and these diagnostics never trigger.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.story.symbols.markdownDescription:
Enables cross-language story symbol indexing: story event names, flags, and AI-notification ids become navigable symbols across XML story threads and Lua scripts (hover, go-to-definition, find references).

Builds on `#aet-eaw-edit.features.story.discovery#` - without discovery, story files are not typed and nothing is indexed.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.story.rename.markdownDescription:
Enables cross-language story symbol rename: renaming a story event, flag, or AI-notification id updates every XML and Lua occurrence in the workspace. Ambiguous event names (defined more than once) are rejected instead of mass-renamed.

Builds on `#aet-eaw-edit.features.story.symbols#` - without symbol indexing there is nothing to rename.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.dialog.diagnostics.markdownDescription:
Enables the story-dialog language service: diagnostics for dialog `.txt` scripts under the `.pgproj` `directories.storyDialog` folders (unknown commands, argument errors, missing localisation keys and speech/movie/SFX references) plus the XML-side `Story_Dialog`/`Story_Chapter` cross-checks.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.dialog.inlayHints.markdownDescription:
Enables inlay hints in story-dialog `.txt` scripts: `TEXT`/`TITLE` lines show the referenced localisation text at the end of the line (or a MISSING marker for unknown keys).

Only applies to files under the `.pgproj` `directories.storyDialog` folders.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.dialog.goToDefinit.markdownDescription:
Enables go-to-definition in story-dialog `.txt` scripts: `DIALOG`, `MOVIE`/`MOVIE_ONCE`, and `SFX` arguments jump to the defining XML object.

Only applies to files under the `.pgproj` `directories.storyDialog` folders.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.localisation.markdownDescription:
Enables the localisation tooling: the localisation editor panel's data source, the initialise/import commands, and the create-key code action.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.storyEditor.markdownDescription:
Enables the story editor protocol surface: the `aet/getStoryPlots`, `aet/getStoryGraph`, `aet/getStoryNodeDetail`, and `aet/getStorySchema` requests plus the `aet/storyGraphChanged` change notification.

Builds on `#aet-eaw-edit.features.story.discovery#` - without discovery there are no campaigns to serve.

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.storyEditing.markdownDescription:
Enables **Edit mode** in the story graph panel: staging changes, previewing and validating them, and writing them back to the story XML.

Without this the panel is read-only - the graph can still be browsed in View mode.

Builds on `#aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.storyEditor#` (the panel hosting it).

*Work in progress - disabled by default.*

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

aet-eaw-edit.features.tools.variants.markdownDescription:
Enables the variant-inheritance tooling: the *Show Effective Object* command and its code lens.

Changing this setting automatically restarts the LSP server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run check-types && npm run bundle -- --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
